name: BulletTime
description: You cannot draw additional cards this turn. Reduce the cost of ALL cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] to 0 this turn.
description_raw: You cannot draw additional cards this turn. Reduce the cost of ALL cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] to 0 this turn.

name: Distraction
description: Add a random Skill into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It costs 0 [energy:1] this turn.
description_raw: Add a random Skill into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It costs 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.

name: InfernalBlade
description: Add a random Attack into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It costs 0 [energy:1] this turn.
description_raw: Add a random Attack into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It costs 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.

name: Metamorphosis
description: Add 3 random Attacks into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. They cost 0 [energy:1] this combat.
description_raw: Add {Cards:diff()} random Attacks into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. They cost 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this combat.
upgrade_description: Add 5 random Attacks into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. They cost 0 [energy:1] this combat.

name: WhiteNoise
description: Add a random Power into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It costs 0 [energy:1] this turn.
description_raw: Add a random Power into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It costs 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.

name: WraithForm
description:
Gain 2 [gold]Intangible[/gold].
At the start of your turn, lose 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
description_raw:
Gain {IntangiblePower:diff()} [gold]Intangible[/gold].
At the start of your turn, lose {WraithFormPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
upgrade_description:
Gain 3 [gold]Intangible[/gold].
At the start of your turn, lose 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
